text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's me! Falco, number one in your heart! And
two, three, and all the rest except number
eighteen! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You want a signature? A handshake? I appreciate
the support. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Trainer! Sorry, I spaced out for a second. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is a little off today. Her calm
demeanor of late is nowhere to be seen—it's as if
her mind is off in the clouds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: You've got a race to run. Focus!
You've got a race to run. Focus!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about that! I won't space out anymore,
promise!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is the third race in my first-place challenge.
We're right at the halfway point.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've gotta win big and draw everyone in! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her smile is a tad forced, it looks like she's
fully focused again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to ask "Can we talk?"—but before I can
finish, she stops me with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep my head fully in the race when I
run.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I need you to go easy on me right now, okay?
For the time being, I just need to win.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win, win, and win some more. And at
the end of the road awaits an incredibly electric
Oi Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So... Please do me a favor and watch over me like
you always do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile doesn't allow for debate. All I can do is
nod.
